signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Confirmed Resolved, Driving XRP Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Confirmed Resolved, Driving XRP Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a major regulatory overhang and fueling XRP's 10% monthly gain in April 2026, with prices breaking above $1.50 to settle near $1.42.[1] This resolution signals institutional acceptance, with analysts forecasting targets up to $2.71

signals.headline: Solana's Official 'XRP' Tweet on April 15 | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana's Official 'XRP' Tweet on April 15 | NO | LOW confidence**

signals.headline: Lakers Lead Rockets 1-0 After Game 1 Win; Luka Doncic Out for First Round, Austin Reaves Progressing, KD Cleared for Gam
signals.raw:
Lakers Lead Rockets 1-0 After Game 1 Win; Luka Doncic Out for First Round, Austin Reaves Progressing, KD Cleared for Game 2 | YES (Lakers favored to win series) | HIGH confidence**[1][2][3][5][6]

Lakers defeated Houston Rockets 120-101 in Game 1 at home, with Luke Kennard scoring a game-high 27 points amid absences of Luka Doncic, Austin Reaves, and Kevin Durant (who was ruled out pre-game).[1][3

signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launched on Solana on April 17 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launched on Solana on April 17 | YES | MED confidence**  
wXRP went live on Solana via Hex Trust and LayerZero, enabling XRP holders to access Solana's DeFi ecosystem; XRP rose 5.15% to $1.40 in the following 48 hours, though broader markets showed limited reaction.[2][7] Price implications for expanded utility remain underpriced per some analysts.[2]
